flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Washington Adventist University fell 28% between 2021 and 2024 (40.0% → 28.6%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 24% at Washington Adventist University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (522 vs 690).

flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Washington Adventist University fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (594 → 452).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Washington Adventist University fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (19.4% → 15.4%).
